channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'New York Times' alleges White House abuses legal system to intimidate reporters
item.description: The New York Times will argue in court Thursday that the White House is misusing the justice system to pressure reporters over a story that angered the president.

item.title: These Catholic sisters want to start a new order with a difficult mission: helping clergy abuse survivors
item.description: Sisters Theresa Alethia and Danielle Lussier, known as the Sisters of the Little Way of Beauty, Truth and Goodness, plan to support victims of clergy abuse.

item.title: White House promotes healthy eating while cutting a key nutrition education program
item.description: Nutrition advocates and public health experts are puzzled by the elimination of SNAP-Ed, given the Trump administration's support for the Make...

item.title: U.S.-Saudi nuclear deal draws criticism in Israel
item.description: The nuclear power agreement between the U.S. and Saudi Arabia alarmed Israel, raising concerns about the relationship between the two allies and ...
